CustomField.description:
Defines the default sort order for the Grid Builder result table.
The Grid Builder will automatically apply these sort fields to search results when no user-defined sorting is applied.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Enter one field per line using the format ObjectApiName => FieldApiName. Example: Strategy__c => AssetClass__c Share_Class__c => ISIN__c
Each line represents one sorting level, where the first line is the primary sort field, the second line is the secondary sort field, and so on.
The Grid Builder will automatically apply these sort fields to search results when no user-defined sorting is applied.
CustomField.label: Default Sort Fields
